tools.name: search.products
tools.description: Use this when a user is looking for non-travel products like goods, experiences, dining or services on Slevomat. Do not use for travel related queries like accommodations or tours, or unrelated questions like transportation or weather.

tools.name: search.travel-products
tools.description: Use this when a user is looking for travel experiences or accommodations on Slevomat based on specific criteria such as destination, date, group size, included services (e.g. meals, wellness), or travel style. Do not use for general inspiration queries, open-ended gift ideas, or unrelated questions like transportation or weather.
